title: Netflix raises US prices once more — what does this mean for viewers?
summary: Netflix has increased subscription prices in the United States for the second time in under two years, raising costs across all plans. The move reflects broader industry pressures and a push to boost revenue amid slowing subscriber growth.

title: Sony to raise PlayStation 5 price to offset soaring memory chip costs. Here's how much it will cost now
summary: Effective 2 April, the new US pricing will set the standard Sony PlayStation 5 at $649.99, up from $549.99.

title: Sharp launches India's first window AC with active air purification: Check price, specs, and features
summary: Sharp has launched the Ryohu-FS fixed-speed window ACs with capacities from 1.41 to 1.70 tons. The new window AC lineup comes with a 5-year warranty with prices starting at ₹34,490 in India.

summary: Google employees are using a new AI tool named Agent Smith which automates tasks like coding. The popularity of the new tool has led Google to restrict has led to restricted access by the company .

summary: WhatsApp's latest update has introduced some new features like dual accounts on iOS, cross-platform chat transfer, and improved storage management. title: Urban Company's Insta Help crosses one million bookings in March
summary: Urban Company's quick service housekeeping vertical Insta Help crossed one million monthly bookings in March. The development comes after the company reported over 50,000 daily orders in February.

title: Info Edge commits Rs 250 crore to deeptech fund; sells Shopkirana stake
summary: Info Edge, which was an early investor in Zomato, said the fund will be sponsored and managed by Info Edge’s subsidiary Smartweb Internet Services and support early-stage deeptech startups in India.

title: Here’s how countries are cracking down on kids’ social media use
summary: As concerns over online safety increase, governments around the world are tightening rules on children’s access to social media. In India, several states have moved to restrict access to social media for children.

title: Cyber threats moving from data theft to physical life risks: Deloitte cyber lead
summary: Gaurav Shukla, partner and leader - cyber at Deloitte South Asia, explained that a cyber attack on a medical device altering patient data could be fatal, while a hack on power generation and transmission components could cause severe national blackouts.

title: Demand and risks for global data centre insurance growing: Swiss Re
summary: A report by Swiss Re says rapid data centre growth is increasing insurance demand and risks. Premiums could reach $24.2 billion by 2030. High construction costs, natural catastrophes, and system failures raise exposure, while insurers can cover only part of losses, which could be significant.
